title: Winger family
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Winger family''' was based on [[Garos IV]] and consisted of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Tork Winger]] and his wife [[Sali Winger]]. The couple adopted a daughter, [[Alexandra Winger]], who would join the anti-Imperial [[Committee of Seven for Garosian Unification|Garos Resistance]] group. Alexandra had no recollection of her father and only remembered her mother's name as "Ana". In reality, her parents were named [[Matt Turhaya]] and [[Anii Degarienne]].

==Family tree==
                                           [[Tork Winger]]---+---[[Sali Winger]]
                                                             |
        [[Matt Turhaya]]---+---[[Anii Degarienne]] parents by adoption
                           |                                 |
                biological parents                           |
                           |                                 |
                           -----------------------------------
                                           |
                                  [[Alexandra Winger]]
